TransponderChannelData.title: Satellite Frequencies
TransponderChannelData.helpBody:
This plugin displays transponder and channel frequency information for geostationary TV satellites. Select a satellite with known channel data and open this panel to view its broadcast frequencies, channels, beam coverage, and encryption details.

Use the download button in the title bar to export the channel data as a CSV file.

errorMsgs.NoChannelInfo: Satellite does not have channel information
errorMsgs.NotSatellite: Selected object is not a satellite
errorMsgs.FetchFailed: Failed to fetch channel info for {name} and {altName}
